recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: The Rocketeer
recommendations.overview: A stunt pilot comes across a prototype jetpack that gives him the ability to fly. However, evil forces of the world also want this jetpack at any cost.

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: A man wakes in a hospital with no memory, and quickly finds himself on the run in a locked down hospital with the Cartel on his tail.

recommendations.title: Ghost in the Shell
recommendations.overview: In the near future, Major is the first of her kind: a human saved from a terrible crash, then cyber-enhanced to be a perfect soldier devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals.

recommendations.title: Archive
recommendations.overview: 2038: George Almore is working on a true human-equivalent AI, and his latest prototype is almost ready. This sensitive phase is also the riskiest as he has a goal that must be hidden at all costs—being reunited with his dead wife.

recommendations.title: R.O.T.O.R.
recommendations.overview: Robotic Officer Tactical Operation Research. A prototype robot intended for crime combat escapes from the development lab and goes on a killing rampage.

recommendations.title: Sri Asih
recommendations.overview: Alana discover the truth about her origin: she’s not an ordinary human being. She may be the gift for humanity and become its protector as Sri Asih. Or a destruction, if she can’t control her anger.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Fantasy, Adventure, Action, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.
